title: NiPaDa Signed Corpus
description: Schema for a NiPaDa signed-corpus document (outer wrapper) and its entry objects. Versions v14/v16/v17 all conform to this schema.

atoms.description: Ordered list of semantic atom names used in this corpus.

oneOf.description: Dict keyed by local_id (legacy format). Values are entry objects.

signature.description: Map of atom name → relative frequency weight (L1-normalised, sums to ~1.0).

top3.description: Top-3 atoms as [[atom, weight], ...] sorted descending by weight.

fragment.description: A 500-word text fragment with its SHA-256 hash.

entry.description: One signed corpus entry for a single work or collection.

graph_node_id.description: Canonical identifier in the NiPaDa knowledge graph (always present).

local_id.description: Identifier used in file caches and local pipeline (may equal graph_node_id).

catalog.description: Catalog identifier the entry belongs to (e.g. 'buddhist_axial', 'indian_axial').

lang.description: BCP-47 language code of the signed text (e.g. 'eng', 'fra', 'chi').

n_chars.description: Character count of the signed text.

n_words.description: Word count of the signed text.

matched.description: True if the entry was matched to a node in the knowledge graph.

lexicon_version.description: Version tag of the atom lexicon used for signing (e.g. 'v14', 'v212f', 'v280').

url.description: Canonical URL of the signed text.

url_original.description: Source URL at time of ingestion.

url_wayback.description: Internet Archive Wayback URL for provenance.

v14_top3.description: Top-3 atoms of the V14 signature.

v16_signature.description: V16 (16-atom) L1-normalised semantic signature (adds CAUSALITÉ, ÉVÉNEMENT).

v16_top3.description: Top-3 atoms of the V16 signature.

v17_top3.description: Top-3 atoms of the V17 signature.

fragments.description: List of 500-word text fragments with content hashes.

fragments_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the concatenated fragment hashes (provenance fingerprint).

text_missing.description: True if the cached text was unavailable and the signature was projected.

cache_origin.description: Cache path category used during signing (e.g. 'v263_cache', 'suttacentral_cache', 'projection_no_text').

v260_fix.description: True if the entry was corrected by the §260 deduplication pass.

n_chapters_fetched.description: Number of chapter files fetched for this work (§263 patch).

source_volumes.description: SBE or other volume identifiers contributing text for this entry.

source_url.description: Direct URL of the first source chapter/file.

script_version.description: Version of the ingestion script that produced this entry.

signed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this entry was signed.

signed_n_chars.description: Character count actually used for signing (may differ from n_chars for partial ingestion).

n_segments.description: Number of logical segments (paragraphs, suttas, etc.).

n_words_total.description: Total word count including un-signed fragments.
